parameters.command: echo '=== ORACLE_DISK ===' && df -h / | tail -1 && echo '=== MINIO ===' && docker exec minio mc du --json local/ 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("size","unknown"))' 2>/dev/null || echo 'minio_unavailable'
echo '=== SSD ===' && df -h / | tail -1 && echo '=== HDD ===' && df -h /mnt/hdd 2>/dev/null | tail -1
